safety_boundary.authority_claim: DEMO ROOT FALLBACK — canonicalizer integration pending.

world.name: Arena Vanguard: Frontier Scout Loop
world.objective: Clear the Frontier creature camp, loot the leader, return to the Citadel, advance world age, then verify replay, restore, and migration preserve the remembered ruin.

verification.migration: local source package to destination visualization only

scripted_loop: Move from the Citadel to the Frontier camp.
Fight 2-4 creatures using Space or click.
Kill the camp leader to create the remembered ruin.
Pick up the leader loot with E.
Press L to return later and age the world.
Press R to replay the local journal and verify the remembered world.
Press C to restore a checkpoint and continue.
Press M to migrate the local world package and preserve memory.
